name: pkc
description: PKC — Portable Knowledge Cartridge. Desktop tool for Mac, Linux, and Windows.

scripts.electron:make: npm run build && electron-builder build -c ./electron-builder.config.cjs -p never
scripts.electron:make:mac: npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder build --mac -c ./electron-builder.config.cjs -p never
scripts.electron:make:win: npm run build && electron-builder build --win --x64 -c ./electron-builder.config.cjs -p never
